Package com.github.scribejava.core.oauth

Class OAuth20Service

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.github.scribejava.core.oauth.OAuthService
      • com.github.scribejava.core.oauth.OAuth20Service
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    OAuth20AsyncOperations, OAuth20Operations, Closeable, AutoCloseable
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    OidcService, PolarOAuthService
    public class OAuth20Service
extends OAuthService
implements OAuth20AsyncOperations, OAuth20Operations
    Service principal pour OAuth 2.0 (Refactorisé SOLID).

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor Description
